By the night as it settles—
your Lord has not abandoned youFootnote-1, nor has He despised(you) .
And indeed the Last is better for youFootnote-2than the First,
and your Lord will certainly give you so that you will be well pleased.
Did He not find youFootnote-3an orphan, so He sheltered(you) ;
and found you wandering, so He guided(you) ;
and found you in need, so He enriched(you) ?
So as for the orphan, doFootnote-4not subdue;
and as for the asker, do not rebuke;
and as for the blessing of your Lord, do talk about it.
